name: Anderson Family YMCA
description: Anderson Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Anderson, IN. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Anderson Township Trustee Community Center
description: Anderson Township Trustee Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Anderson, IN. There are 6 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. Reservations are available.

name: Bethany Christian Church
description: Bethany Christian Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Anderson, IN. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Community Sports and Wellness Center
description: Come play pickleball at Community Sports and Wellness Center in Pendleton, IN! There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available. Players have access to a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, lights, and trainers or lessons.

name: Elwood Family YMCA
description: Elwood Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Elwood, IN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Fall Creek Christian Church
description: Fall Creek Christian Church is a place to play pickleball in Pendleton, IN. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Reservations are not available. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms.

name: General Pulaski Park
description: General Pulaski Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Anderson, IN. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Shadyside Lake
description: Shadyside Lake is a place to play pickleball in Anderson, IN. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

description: Come play pickleball at Wesley Free Methodist Church in Anderson, IN! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.
